name: data_ingestion
description: New data ingestion workflow. Archive → detect → confirm → exclude → ingest → validate.

nodes.instruction: Delegate to ingest-archiver agent. Brief: copy source file to {PROJECT_ROOT}/vault/originals/, compute SHA-256, handle filename collisions, record size. Return archived path, sha256, file size.
nodes.delegate_hint: Use ingest-archiver for archive + checksum + collision-safe file intake

nodes.description: Detect file structure: columns, encoding, row count, data types
nodes.instruction: Delegate to ingest-structure-detector agent. Brief: read archived file from {PROJECT_ROOT}/vault/originals/, detect sheets/columns/encoding/row count/merged cells. Return a structural report for confirm_with_user. If table-name suggestions are included, treat them as heuristic candidates only; final target-table choice is confirmed later, not decided inside detect_structure.
nodes.delegate_hint: Use ingest-structure-detector for file structure discovery before any schema mapping or DB choice

nodes.description: Present structure findings and column mappings to user for confirmation. Read checklist and report responses.
nodes.instruction: Read checklist: shared/workflows/checklists/data_ingestion__confirm_with_user.yaml. Present findings: sheet mapping, structural anomalies, heuristic table-name candidates, and proposed column mappings. Key confirmations needed: (1) correct DB table target? (2) column mappings correct? (3) -AU suffix / PANJIT digit2 handling confirmed? (4) exclusion rules scope confirmed? Wait for user confirmation before proceeding. Complete with either `checklist_responses` or compact `{"summary":"<confirmed mappings and unresolved items>"}` for this single-item checklist.

nodes.description: Apply data exclusion rules if needed (exclusion is project-specific, not at ingestion time)
nodes.instruction: Delegate to ingest-exclusion-engine agent. Brief: apply the confirmed exclusion_policy, normalize merged cells before matching, produce operation_id, and return rows_in/rows_out/exclusion_summary. If company-specific BOM/ECR exclusion rules are required, consult the `bom-ingest-exclusion-applier` overlay agent or its paired local skill first, then execute via the engine. Complete with: --outputs '{"operation_id":"xxx"}'.
nodes.delegate_hint: Use ingest-exclusion-engine for generic exclusion execution; consult overlay rules only when project-specific policy is required

nodes.description: Ingest cleaned data into SQLite database with source tracking
nodes.instruction: Delegate to ingest-db-writer agent. Brief: batch INSERT (batch_size=1000) to {PROJECT_ROOT}/workspace/db/*.db. Every row must have _operation_id, _source_file, _source_version, _source_row columns. Check idempotency via operation_id before inserting. Complete with outputs including db_path, operation_id, and tables written, for example {"db_path":"projects/<project>/workspace/db/<name>.db","operation_id":"...","tables":["raw_bom"]}.
nodes.delegate_hint: Use ingest-db-writer for idempotent SQLite writes with traceability columns

nodes.description: Regenerate SCHEMA_{db}.md after DB changes so AI always has up-to-date table/column names. Run: bash shared/tools/conda-python.sh shared/tools/db_schema.py generate <db_path>
nodes.instruction: Run: bash shared/tools/conda-python.sh shared/tools/db_schema.py generate {PROJECT_ROOT}/workspace/db/<name>.db. This regenerates SCHEMA_{db}.md. Required after any DB schema change. Complete with outputs including schema_path, for example {"schema_path":"projects/<project>/workspace/db/SCHEMA_<name>.md"}. Verify SCHEMA file appears in workspace/db/.

nodes.description: Validate ingested data quality. Read checklist, run each check, report results in checklist_responses.
nodes.instruction: Delegate to ingest-validator agent. Brief: run checklist shared/workflows/checklists/data_ingestion__post_validation.yaml checks (pv-001...pv-NNN), scoped to current operation_id. Checks cover: NULL rate, duplicates, value ranges, encoding, traceability columns (_operation_id/_source_file/_source_version/_source_row present). Complete with checklist_responses plus db_path, operation_id, and tables so traceability validator scopes to the exact batch.
nodes.delegate_hint: Use ingest-validator for batch-scoped validation and traceability checks after ingestion
